Video.summary: Neil deGrasse Tyson and his co-host discuss the grandfather paradox. Then, Janna Levin talks black holes.
Video.grandparentTitle: StarTalk Things You Thought You Knew
Video.title: Grandfather Paradox & Black Holes

Video.summary: Physicist Brian Greene, Neil deGrasse Tyson, and Chuck discuss spacetime, free will, and the meaning of life.
Video.title: Until the End of Time with Brian Greene

Image.alt: Until the End of Time with Brian Greene
Until the End of Time with Brian Greene
Until the End of Time with Brian Greene

Video.summary: Bill Nye is joined by a co-host and former astronaut Mike Massimino to talk about funding space exploration.
Video.title: Funding Space Exploration with Bill Nye

Image.alt: Funding Space Exploration with Bill Nye
Funding Space Exploration with Bill Nye
Funding Space Exploration with Bill Nye

Video.summary: Join Neil deGrasse Tyson, a comedian, and NASA astronaut as they talk about about living in space.
Video.title: Seeing Earth From Space

Video.summary: Science surrounds us every day. Astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson takes you from novice to knowledgeable, explaining how planes fly, what makes a rainbow, why hurricanes form, and the many other fascinating wonders that make up our world.
Video.grandparentTitle: StarTalk Things You Thought You Knew
Video.title: StarTalk Things You Thought You Knew Season 3 Marathon

Image.alt: StarTalk Things You Thought You Knew Season 3 Marathon
StarTalk Things You Thought You Knew Season 3 Marathon
StarTalk Things You Thought You Knew Season 3 Marathon

Video.summary: Neil deGrasse Tyson, Chuck, and Gary break down the timeline of the universe, then the space-time continuum.
Video.grandparentTitle: StarTalk Things You Thought You Knew
Video.title: The Universe & Space-Time Continuum

Video.summary: Neil deGrasse Tyson, his co-hosts, and experts investigate the brain, going inside the mind of an athlete.
Video.title: The Mind of an Athlete Part 2

Image.alt: The Mind of an Athlete Part 2
The Mind of an Athlete Part 2
The Mind of an Athlete Part 2

Video.summary: Join Neil deGrasse Tyson, his co-host, and an astrophysicist as they cover everything about black holes.
Video.title: Black Hole Survival Guide

Video.summary: Watch Neil deGrasse Tyson and Chuck dive into the theory of relativity. Then, learn about the Coriolis effect.
Video.grandparentTitle: StarTalk Things You Thought You Knew
Video.title: Time Dialation and Coriolis Effect

Video.summary: Neil deGrasse Tyson and his co-host answer questions about spacetime, black holes, and cosmic evolution.
Video.title: Wormholes, Black Holes, and Simulations

Video.summary: Dr. Anthony Aveni joins Neil deGrasse Tyson and Chuck Nice to discuss the concept of timekeeping.
Video.title: Why Do We Timekeep?

Video.summary: Physicist Brian Cox joins Neil deGrasse Tyson and Chuck to explore the Higgs boson and quantum entanglement.
Video.title: Quantum Catastrophe

Video.summary: With Neil and neuroscientist Heather Berlin, discover how films impact brain, memory, and emotions.
Video.title: Mind, Movies & Manipulation

Video.summary: Neil and Chuck discuss psychedelics with Rick Doblin, covering therapy, legality, and mind exploration.
Video.title: Psychedelics: Probing the Mind

Video.summary: Neil deGrasse Tyson and a panel of co-hosts and experts discuss mental health, meditation, and consciousness.
Video.title: Mind Over Matter Part 2

Video.summary: Neil deGrasse Tyson and Chuck sit down with a theoretical physicist to talk time travel, paradoxes, and more.
Video.title: Time Travel with Brian Greene

Video.summary: Neil deGrasse Tyson and a co-host learn why 2023 was hotter than expected from an expert climatologist.
Video.title: Climate Models and Time Travel

Video.summary: Hakeem Oluseyi joins Neil deGrasse Tyson and Chuck to discuss his journey to becoming an astrophysicist.
Video.title: Living a Quantum Life with Hakeem Oluseyi

Image.alt: Living a Quantum Life with Hakeem Oluseyi
Living a Quantum Life with Hakeem Oluseyi
Living a Quantum Life with Hakeem Oluseyi

Video.summary: Writer and actress Alie Ward joins Neil deGrasse Tyson and Chuck to explore the vast world of niche sciences.
Video.title: Niche Sciences

Video.summary: Dr. Aomawa Shields joins Neil deGrasse Tyson and co-host to explore exoplanets, acting and more.
Video.title: From the Theatre to Mars

Video.summary: How clean is your electric car? Neil deGrasse Tyson and Chuck explore clean electricity, then flying cars.
Video.grandparentTitle: StarTalk Things You Thought You Knew
Video.title: Clean Electricity and Flying Cars

Video.summary: Author Will Harris joins Neil deGrasse Tyson and co-hosts to learn about the future of food production.
Video.grandparentTitle: StarTalk Things You Thought You Knew
Video.title: Regenerative Farming

Video.summary: Neil deGrasse Tyson and a panel of experts and co-hosts break down the innovation of self-driving cars.
Video.title: The Rise of Self-Driving Cars

Video.summary: Neil deGrasse Tyson explores reaction times, focus, and mental training in drone racing and NASCAR.
Video.title: The Sport of Car Racing

Video.summary: What makes a phenom athlete? Neil deGrasse Tyson and co-hosts explore the factors that come into play.
Video.title: Genetics and Phenom Athletes Part 2
